code:
/** * MediHelp — react-i18next configuration * --------------------------------------- * HOW IT WORKS: * 1. i18next holds the "current language" in state. * 2. useTranslation() hook gives every component a `t('key')` function. * 3. When the user switches language, i18next updates the language and * every component that calls t() re-renders automatically — including * History items that were typed in English. The KEYS never change, * only the VALUE that t() returns based on the active language. * 4. i18next-browser-languagedetector saves the user's choice to * localStorage so it persists across page reloads. * * HOW TO INSTALL (run once in your project folder): * npm install react-i18next i18next i18next-browser-languagedetector * * HOW TO USE IN A COMPONENT: * import { useTranslation } from 'react-i18next'; * const { t } = useTranslation(); * return

{t('hello')}, {user.name}

; * * Place this file at: src/i18n.js * Import it once in: src/index.js → import './i18n'; */ import i18n from 'i18next'; import { initReactI18next } from 'react-i18next'; import LanguageDetector from 'i18next-browser-languagedetector'; // ── Translation resources ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── // All keys live here. Add a new key to EN, copy it to SW with the translation. // Tip: keep keys lowercase_snake_case so they're easy to search. const resources = { en: { translation: { // ── Navigation / tabs ────────────────────────────────────────────────── dashboard_title: 'MediHelp AI Nutrition Dashboard', hello: 'Hello', tab_ai_chat: 'AI Chat', tab_history: 'History', tab_appointments: 'Appointments', tab_medications: 'Medications', tab_trends: 'Health Trends', tab_hospitals: 'Hospitals', tab_profile: 'Profile', // ── Chatbot ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── online: 'Online', new_chat: 'New Chat', press_enter: 'Press Enter to send', ai_guidance_only: 'AI guidance only · Not a substitute for medical advice', analysing: 'Analysing symptoms…', chat_placeholder: 'Describe your symptoms… e.g. I feel tired, hair falling out, dizzy', chat_welcome_name: 'Hello {{name}}!', chat_welcome_body: "I'm MediHelp AI — your Kenya nutrition health assistant.\n\nDescribe your symptoms in plain language and I'll identify possible nutritional deficiencies with Kenyan food solutions.\n\n**Try:** \"I feel tired all the time, my hair is falling out and I get dizzy\"\n\nWhat symptoms are you experiencing?", chat_found: 'I found **{{count}} potential deficiency risk{{plural}}** based on your symptoms.\n\nTop match: **{{name}}** ({{confidence}}% confidence).\n\nExpand each card below for Kenyan food remedies, tips, supplements and doctor guidance.', chat_not_found: "I didn't detect a specific nutritional deficiency from that — you might be asking a general health question, which is completely fine!\n\nFor the best results, describe **physical symptoms** you're experiencing. For example:\n\n• \"I feel **tired**, look **pale**, dizzy\" → Iron deficiency\n• \"**Bone pain**, low mood, fatigue\" → Vitamin D\n• \"**Numbness** in hands/feet, forgetful\" → Vitamin B12\n• \"Child has **swollen belly**, slow growth\" → Protein\n• \"**Night blindness**, dry eyes\" → Vitamin A\n\nWhat physical symptoms are you experiencing?", // ── DefCard ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── details: 'Details', collapse: 'Collapse', match: 'match', kenyan_foods: 'Kenyan Foods', tips: 'Tips', limit_avoid: 'Limit / Avoid', supplement: 'Supplement', see_doctor_if: 'See a doctor if', was_helpful: 'Was this helpful?', yes: 'Yes', no: 'No', thanks_feedback: 'Thanks for your feedback!', ai_disclaimer: 'AI assessment only. Confirm with blood tests. sourcesContent:
/** * MediHelp — react-i18next configuration * --------------------------------------- * HOW IT WORKS: * 1. i18next holds the "current language" in state. * 2. useTranslation() hook gives every component a `t('key')` function. * 3. When the user switches language, i18next updates the language and * every component that calls t() re-renders automatically — including * History items that were typed in English. The KEYS never change, * only the VALUE that t() returns based on the active language. * 4. i18next-browser-languagedetector saves the user's choice to * localStorage so it persists across page reloads. * * HOW TO INSTALL (run once in your project folder): * npm install react-i18next i18next i18next-browser-languagedetector * * HOW TO USE IN A COMPONENT: * import { useTranslation } from 'react-i18next'; * const { t } = useTranslation(); * return

{t('hello')}, {user.name}

; * * Place this file at: src/i18n.js * Import it once in: src/index.js → import './i18n'; */ import i18n from 'i18next'; import { initReactI18next } from 'react-i18next'; import LanguageDetector from 'i18next-browser-languagedetector'; // ── Translation resources ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── // All keys live here. Add a new key to EN, copy it to SW with the translation. // Tip: keep keys lowercase_snake_case so they're easy to search. const resources = { en: { translation: { // ── Navigation / tabs ────────────────────────────────────────────────── dashboard_title: 'MediHelp AI Nutrition Dashboard', hello: 'Hello', tab_ai_chat: 'AI Chat', tab_history: 'History', tab_appointments: 'Appointments', tab_medications: 'Medications', tab_trends: 'Health Trends', tab_hospitals: 'Hospitals', tab_profile: 'Profile', // ── Chatbot ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── online: 'Online', new_chat: 'New Chat', press_enter: 'Press Enter to send', ai_guidance_only: 'AI guidance only · Not a substitute for medical advice', analysing: 'Analysing symptoms…', chat_placeholder: 'Describe your symptoms… e.g. I feel tired, hair falling out, dizzy', chat_welcome_name: 'Hello {{name}}!', chat_welcome_body: "I'm MediHelp AI — your Kenya nutrition health assistant.\n\nDescribe your symptoms in plain language and I'll identify possible nutritional deficiencies with Kenyan food solutions.\n\n**Try:** \"I feel tired all the time, my hair is falling out and I get dizzy\"\n\nWhat symptoms are you experiencing?", chat_found: 'I found **{{count}} potential deficiency risk{{plural}}** based on your symptoms.\n\nTop match: **{{name}}** ({{confidence}}% confidence).\n\nExpand each card below for Kenyan food remedies, tips, supplements and doctor guidance.', chat_not_found: "I didn't detect a specific nutritional deficiency from that — you might be asking a general health question, which is completely fine!\n\nFor the best results, describe **physical symptoms** you're experiencing. For example:\n\n• \"I feel **tired**, look **pale**, dizzy\" → Iron deficiency\n• \"**Bone pain**, low mood, fatigue\" → Vitamin D\n• \"**Numbness** in hands/feet, forgetful\" → Vitamin B12\n• \"Child has **swollen belly**, slow growth\" → Protein\n• \"**Night blindness**, dry eyes\" → Vitamin A\n\nWhat physical symptoms are you experiencing?", // ── DefCard ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── details: 'Details', collapse: 'Collapse', match: 'match', kenyan_foods: 'Kenyan Foods', tips: 'Tips', limit_avoid: 'Limit / Avoid', supplement: 'Supplement', see_doctor_if: 'See a doctor if', was_helpful: 'Was this helpful?', yes: 'Yes', no: 'No', thanks_feedback: 'Thanks for your feedback!', ai_disclaimer: 'AI assessment only. Confirm with blood tests. Always consult a licensed healthcare professional.', // ── History ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── history_count: 'History ({{count}})', export_pdf: 'Export PDF', no_history: 'No analyses yet. Chat with the AI to get started!', history_error: "Could not load history. Run migrate_db.py if you haven't yet, then restart Flask.", show_details: 'Show details', no_deficiencies: 'No deficiencies matched', confirm_delete_item: 'Delete this analysis record? This cannot be undone.', rule_based: 'Rule-based', delete_record: 'Delete this record?', // ── Hospitals ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── hospitals: 'Hospitals', hospital_search_ph: 'e.g. Kenyatta National, Aga Khan, Nairobi Hospital…', search_btn: 'Search', near_me: 'Near Me', locating: 'Locating…', searching_osm: 'Searching OpenStreetMap…', hospital_info: 'Search any hospital by name, or use Near Me to find facilities within 30 km.', hospital_prompt: 'Search for a hospital by name, or tap Near Me.', no_hospitals: 'No hospitals found. Try a different name.', no_phone: 'No phone listed', your_location: 'Your Location', open_maps: 'Directions', emergency_badge: 'Emergency', km_away: 'km away', hospitals_found: 'hospitals found', // ── Appointments ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────── book_appointment: 'Book Appointment', upcoming_appointments: 'Your Appointments', appointment_info: 'Appointments are saved to your dashboard. Find hospital contacts in the Hospitals tab to call and confirm.', no_appointments: 'No appointments yet. Book your first one below!', doctor_name: 'Doctor / Specialist', hospital_name: 'Hospital', date: 'Date', time: 'Time', notes: 'Notes (reason for visit)', doctor_ph: 'e.g. Dr. Wambui Kamau', hospital_ph: 'e.g. Kenyatta National, Aga Khan…', notes_ph: 'Symptoms to discuss, reason for visit…', scheduled: 'Scheduled', completed: 'Completed', cancelled: 'Cancelled', // ── Medications ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── medications: 'Medications', add_medication: 'Add Medication', check_interactions: 'Check Interactions', drug_name: 'Drug / Supplement Name', dosage: 'Dosage', frequency: 'Frequency', start_date: 'Start Date', end_date: 'End Date', drug_name_ph: 'e.g. Ferrous Sulphate, Vitamin D3', dosage_ph: 'e.g. 200mg, 1 tablet', freq_ph: 'e.g. Once daily, twice daily', med_notes_ph: 'Special instructions, e.g. take with food', no_medications: 'No medications added yet.', add_med_hint: 'Add your current medications and supplements to check for interactions.', checking: 'Checking…', med_started: 'Started', interaction_source: 'Source', interactions: 'Interactions', severity: 'Severity', description: 'Description', important_note: 'Important', med_disclaimer: 'Always inform your doctor of all medications and supplements. The interaction checker is a reference tool only.', // ── Health Trends ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── trends: 'Health Trends', total_analyses: 'Total Analyses', days_active: 'Days Active', conditions_tracked: 'Conditions Tracked', last_30_days: 'Activity — Last 30 Days', top_conditions: 'Most Common Findings', no_activity: 'No activity in the last 30 days.
